title: MikroTik SR-10U - 19" desktop rack, 10U
description: A very elegant metal and easily mountable mounting frame from MikroTik, size 19" with height 10U is suitable for laboratory tables, exhibitions or demonstrations. It is not new and revolutionary product, it is more of a trifle that can save administrators, engineers, testers a little work when testing or exhibiting active and passive elements with installation in a rack
